title: Connect and Operate MCP in Codex and Claude · Skill Foundry
summary: Configure one safe server in both Codex and Claude Code. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of cross-client MCP configuration and smoke tests while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.
Verify initialization, primitive discovery, tool calls, errors, and shutdown in each client.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""
